data.content: Plan review requested revision. Verified src/knot_id.rs:87 and src/app.rs:536 already use last-hyphen splitting via rsplit_once('-'); rg found no split_once('-') call sites; existing unit test src/knot_id.rs:134 already covers a hyphenated prefix (my-repo-a1b2 -> a1b2). The proposed strip_project_prefix plus caller threading adds complexity without evidence of a real defect. Next planning pass should first reproduce the bug in the named-project flow or identify the actual faulty parser before proposing code changes.
